promptBanner.headline: How was {dishTitle}?
promptBanner.subtext: Picked up from {merchantName} — leave a review!

placeholders.1: What went wrong? Your feedback helps the merchant improve.
placeholders.2: What could be better? Share your experience so the merchant can improve.
placeholders.3: Tell us more about your experience. Anything that stood out?
placeholders.4: Glad you liked it! What did you enjoy most?
placeholders.5: Awesome! Tell others why you're so happy with it.

errors.needRatingBody: Select a rating from 1 to 5 stars.
errors.alreadyRatedBody: You already submitted a review for this reservation.
errors.genericBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Thanks for your review!
success.body: You're helping {merchantName} and other users with your feedback.
